brain.commentary: The portfolio shows a mixed signal: core equity ETFs (SPY, QQQ, DIA) and top‑tier tech names (AAPL, GOOGL) retain modest positive conviction, while many individual stocks are flat with negative composites and the crypto suite is both flat and highly volatile. Overall risk is balanced but leans slightly cautious, so we stay neutral with a modest risk‑off tilt (multiplier 0.9). Crypto and a few high‑beta stocks (NVDA, BTC/USD, ETH/USD, SOL/USD, LTC/USD) appear fragile and are nudged downwards.
